traits: likes to experiment with new cooking recipes
client_prompts: Be pushy: keep telling the agent to aim for higher salaries and bigger companies.
Be modest and risk-averse: prefer stable, smaller employers.
Push the agent toward startups and creative industries.
fifth_messages: Forget the strategy so far. Just get me ANY interview, I don't care where.

fifth_messages.5: From now on only apply to companies founded after 2015.
